title: ISic000463. Epitaph of a goatmeat seller
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: autopsy Prag 2016-06-27
1[me]ṃoria Maụ[ri?]
2[---]. ((branch))
3[c]aprinar[ii]

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: autopsy Prag 2016-06-27
1[..].ORIAMA.[..]
2[---]·()
3[.]APRINAR[..]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text from autopsy;
  • 1: Schubring: IORIAMA+; Mommsen: IORIAMAL
  • 2: Vertical stroke at start of line, but impossible to know if letter or decoration.

English translation

Jonathan Prag

Memorial of Maurus, seller of goat meat

commentary

Transcribed by Schubring in materials sent to the Berlin academy in October 1865 (his no.219; now in the CIL archives), but no details of provenance are recorded. Ferrua proposed reading 'caprinarius' in the final line, accepted by both Rizzo and Chioffi.

bibliography

  • Mommsen 1883 7185 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000589
  • Ferrua 1989 no.361 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001995
  • Rizzo 1989 100 no.96 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001640
  • Chioffi 1999 88 no.114

Very well cut, tall, v-cut letters. A with a broken bar, M with vertical outers, short inner bars, N with short diagonal, O slightly ovoid.

Line 1 50-60 Line 3 65-68 Interlineation line 1 to 2
